scenarios.title: Verify home page loads successfully and displays main elements
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video
Wait for page to fully load
Verify page title contains 'SnipForge' or 'AI Video Toolkit'
Check that main heading is visible
Verify navigation menu is present
Confirm CTA buttons are displayed
scenarios.expectedResult: Home page loads successfully within 3 seconds, all main elements (header, navigation, hero section, CTA buttons) are visible and properly rendered

scenarios.title: Verify all 25 AI tools are listed and accessible from home page
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video
Scroll through the page to locate tools section
Count the number of tools displayed
Verify each tool has a name/title
Verify each tool has a description or icon
Click on at least 3 different tool cards/links
Verify navigation to tool-specific pages works
scenarios.expectedResult: All 25 AI video tools are displayed on the home page with proper labels, descriptions, and clickable links that navigate to respective tool pages

scenarios.title: Verify Free Plan details are correctly displayed
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video
Locate the pricing section on the home page
Find the Free Plan card/section
Verify '3 videos/month' limit is displayed
Verify 'max 5 minutes' duration limit is displayed
Check that the plan is marked as 'Free' or '$0'
Verify sign-up or get-started button for Free Plan exists
scenarios.expectedResult: Free Plan displays correct information: 3 videos per month limit, 5 minutes maximum duration, $0 cost, and includes a call-to-action button

scenarios.title: Verify Pro Plan details and pricing are correctly displayed
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video
Locate the pricing section on the home page
Find the Pro Plan card/section
Verify '$5/month' or '$5 per month' pricing is displayed
Verify 'unlimited' videos feature is mentioned
Check for any additional Pro Plan benefits listed
Verify upgrade or subscribe button for Pro Plan exists
scenarios.expectedResult: Pro Plan displays correct pricing of $5/month, unlimited videos feature, and includes a clear call-to-action button for subscription

scenarios.title: Verify home page responsiveness on mobile viewport
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video
Open browser developer tools
Switch to mobile device emulation (iPhone 12 or similar)
Verify page layout adjusts to mobile viewport
Check that navigation menu shows hamburger icon or mobile menu
Verify all text is readable without horizontal scrolling
Test that pricing cards stack vertically
Verify all buttons are tappable with adequate spacing
scenarios.expectedResult: Home page is fully responsive, all elements adapt to mobile viewport, navigation becomes mobile-friendly, and all interactive elements are easily accessible on mobile devices

scenarios.title: Verify behavior when accessing home page without authentication
steps: Clear all browser cookies and cache
Navigate to https://snipforge.video in incognito/private mode
Verify page loads without requiring login
Check that pricing information is visible to unauthenticated users
Verify tools list/overview is accessible
Click on 'Sign Up' or 'Get Started' button
Verify user is directed to registration/sign-up flow
Attempt to click on a tool without logging in
Verify appropriate behavior (redirect to login or guest preview)
scenarios.expectedResult: Home page is fully accessible without authentication, displays all public information (tools, pricing), and provides clear sign-up prompts when user attempts to access features requiring authentication

scenarios.title: Verify Free Plan displays correct limitations
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Locate the Free plan section
Verify the monthly video limit is displayed as 3 videos
Verify the maximum video duration is displayed as 5 minutes
Verify access to 25 AI tools is mentioned
scenarios.expectedResult: Free plan displays 3 videos/month limit, 5 minutes max duration, and access to 25 tools

scenarios.title: Verify Pro Plan displays correct pricing and features
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Locate the Pro plan section
Verify the price is displayed as $5/month
Verify unlimited videos feature is displayed
Verify access to 25 AI tools is mentioned
scenarios.expectedResult: Pro plan displays $5/month pricing with unlimited videos and access to all 25 tools

scenarios.title: Verify Free to Pro plan upgrade flow initiation
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Locate the Pro plan CTA button
Click on the upgrade/subscribe button for Pro plan
Verify redirect to payment or signup page occurs
Verify Pro plan details are pre-selected
scenarios.expectedResult: User is redirected to payment/signup page with Pro plan selected

scenarios.title: Verify pricing page displays all 25 tools information
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Scroll through the pricing page
Look for tools/features list or comparison section
Verify mention of 25 AI tools is present
Check if tool categories or names are listed
scenarios.expectedResult: Pricing page clearly indicates access to 25 AI video tools across all plans

scenarios.title: Verify pricing page handles missing payment method gracefully
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Click on Pro plan subscribe button
If payment form appears, attempt to submit without entering payment details
Observe validation messages
Verify user remains on appropriate page
scenarios.expectedResult: Appropriate validation errors displayed, user cannot proceed without valid payment method

scenarios.title: Verify annual vs monthly pricing toggle if available
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Look for billing cycle toggle (Monthly/Annual)
If toggle exists, switch between monthly and annual billing
Verify pricing updates accordingly
Verify any discount or savings are displayed for annual plan
scenarios.expectedResult: If billing toggle exists, pricing updates correctly showing monthly at $5 and annual with appropriate calculation or discount

scenarios.title: Successful login with valid credentials
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Enter valid email address in the email field
Enter correct password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Sign In' button
scenarios.expectedResult: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard with access to 25 AI video tools

scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid credentials
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Enter valid email address in the email field
Enter incorrect password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Sign In' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials and user remains on login page without authentication

scenarios.title: Login with empty email and password fields
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Leave email field empty
Leave password field empty
Click the 'Login' or 'Sign In' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Validation error messages appear indicating that email and password fields are required, login is prevented

scenarios.title: Verify free plan user login and access limitations
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Login with credentials of a user on the free plan
Navigate to the dashboard after successful login
Check displayed plan information and usage limits
scenarios.expectedResult: User successfully logs in and dashboard shows Free plan with 3 videos/month limit and max 5 minutes per video restriction

scenarios.title: Verify pro plan user login and unlimited access
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Login with credentials of a user on the Pro plan ($5/month)
Navigate to the dashboard after successful login
Check displayed plan information and usage limits
scenarios.expectedResult: User successfully logs in and dashboard shows Pro plan status with unlimited videos access and all 25 tools available

scenarios.title: SQL injection attempt in login form
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Enter SQL injection payload in email field: ' OR '1'='1' --
Enter any text in password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Sign In' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Login attempt is rejected with appropriate error message, no unauthorized access granted, application remains secure

scenarios.title: Successful user registration with valid email and password
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Enter a valid email address in the email field
Enter a strong password (minimum 8 characters) in the password field
Enter the same password in the confirm password field
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button
Verify email confirmation is sent if applicable
scenarios.expectedResult: User account is created successfully, user is redirected to dashboard or onboarding page, and free plan (3 videos/month, max 5 minutes) is automatically assigned

scenarios.title: Registration fails with already registered email
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Enter an email address that is already registered in the system
Enter a valid password in the password field
Enter the same password in the confirm password field
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Registration fails with an error message indicating 'Email already exists' or 'Account already registered', user remains on registration page

scenarios.title: Registration validation with mismatched passwords
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Enter a valid email address in the email field
Enter a password in the password field
Enter a different password in the confirm password field
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Registration fails with an error message 'Passwords do not match', user remains on registration page with form data preserved

scenarios.title: Registration with invalid email format
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'testuser@', 'test@.com', 'plaintext')
Enter a valid password in the password field
Enter the same password in the confirm password field
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Registration fails with validation error message 'Invalid email format' or similar, submit button may be disabled, user remains on registration page

scenarios.title: Registration with weak password validation
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Enter a valid email address in the email field
Enter a weak password (e.g., '123', 'pass', less than minimum required characters)
Enter the same weak password in the confirm password field
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Registration fails with error message indicating password requirements (e.g., 'Password must be at least 8 characters'), user remains on registration page

scenarios.title: Registration form validation with empty required fields
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Leave all required fields empty (email, password, confirm password)
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button
Alternatively, fill only one field and leave others empty
scenarios.expectedResult: Registration fails with validation error messages for each empty required field (e.g., 'Email is required', 'Password is required'), submit button may be disabled, user remains on registration page
